summary: A fair-code workflow automation platform combining visual building with custom code, offering 400+ integrations and native AI capabilities for automating complex processes.
usecases: Marketing teams automating lead capture, email campaigns, and CRM updates across multiple platforms
Data engineers building ETL pipelines that connect disparate APIs and databases without writing code
SaaS founders deploying custom workflows with self-hosted instances for enterprise client integrations
ideas: Embed AI agents that auto-generate workflows based on natural language descriptions of business processes
Connect with blockchain oracles to trigger smart contracts when workflow conditions are met
Develop AR interfaces for real-time workflow monitoring and node manipulation in 3D space
